AcceptMeetingTask.text:
# Task-specific lessons (from earlier attempts on this app)
Treat these as HINTS, not rules. How to use them:
- Always decide your next action from the CURRENT screenshot first.
- Use a lesson ONLY if it clearly fits this task AND the screen you see now;
  if it does not fit, IGNORE it completely.
- 'avoid' lists past mistakes not to repeat; 'do' is a rough plan to adapt to
  the real UI, never a script to follow blindly.
- Never let a lesson override what the screenshot plainly shows.

When accept a meeting invitation:
  avoid: All attempts assumed the task was a free-text reply and typed an invented body ('I'll be there at 10:00 AM...'); the goal was to ACCEPT the meeting. Use the meeting invite's Accept action instead of composing arbitrary reply text.

When reply to cancel a meeting:
  avoid: All attempts typed an invented/paraphrased body and were marked 'Wrong body'; don't guess wording—read the email's actual requested cancellation message and reply with the exact text the task specifies.

When set brightness to maximum:
  do: open Settings -> scroll to Display -> tap Display -> tap Brightness level -> swipe slider fully left-to-right to 100%
  avoid: Tapping a point near the right end of the slider lands at ~98% (235/255), not true maximum; instead swipe the slider all the way to the far right to reach 100%.

When set screen brightness to minimum:
  do: open Settings -> scroll down -> tap Display -> tap Brightness level -> drag slider fully left (or tap left edge) -> terminate
